---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file 

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```
-->
# BayesSFA

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

This package is in development.Our goal is to allow users to fit Bayesian factor models under various sparsity constraints. More details to be added soon!

TO DO: 

[ ] - consolidate run_mcmc_*.R files into one (i.e. one function call to fit different factor models).

[ ] - Rewrite more helper functions in C++ primarily sample_loadings_*.R, compute_log_likelihood_ratio.R. Vectorize further if possible.

[ ] - Add a function to perform simulation based calibration. Use that to test computation for the samplers.
